notes: Primary BECs from Carole Ober lab Chicago. Processed counts available as supplementary file. Maternal asthma history phenotyped.
Sajuthi et al Nat Comm 2020. 695 Puerto Rican children. Nasal epithelium as proxy for asthma airway. Raw counts and normalized expression available.
Tsoi et al. AD vs healthy + PSO comparator. Raw counts (readcount.txt.gz) available. 125bp paired-end.
Suarez-Farinas et al. Paired AD lesional vs non-lesional (no healthy control). Use non-lesional as within-patient control.
Sherrill et al. PMID 24920534. Active EoE vs healthy. Field-standard EoE RNA-seq dataset. Small but seminal.
Kleuskens et al. PMID 37972740. Baseline + post-injection. Use baseline samples only.
Wang et al. PMID 31439685. Largest CRSwNP RNA-seq. Gene counts available (genecounts_20190903.txt.gz).
Nakayama lab Stanford. Japanese + Caucasian polyps. Bulk RNA-seq.
